title: Notifications html support (Email)

posts.author: ccramsey (Cameron Cramsey)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

This has been spoken about before in other threads but I would like to find out more information around emails, when notifications are received, supporting html. It’s a really nice feature that the notifications honor the html but then when the user receives the email sent from the notification it is in raw text.

Is there a workaround for this or is it planned to support html across both the notifications and the email?

Thank you,

Cam
